name: neo-card-party
description: A public, sanitized monorepo export of a real-time browser card game.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @card-party/shared && npm run build -w card-party-server && npm run build -w card-party-web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @card-party/shared && npm run test -w card-party-server && npm run test -w card-party-web
